title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0143 36 Hampton Park, Bristol, BS6 6LH
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Rod Benol  Site address:  36 Hampton Park, Bristol, BS6 6LH  Description of proposed development:  Erection of a detached dwellinghouse  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   TBC  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 3 December 2025   Date by when representations must be made 12 January 2026   Hearing date and venue TBC   Target Decision 28 January 2026   Decision date TBC     Hearing Documents  Decision  Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 12 January 2026.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0143 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     1645 L 56 Proposed East Elev  (PDF, 529 KB, 1 page)  1645 L 57 Proposed South Elev  (PDF, 475 KB, 1 page)  1645 L 58 Proposed West Elev  (PDF, 416 KB, 1 page)  1645 L 60 Proposed Section AA  (PDF, 343 KB, 1 page)  251107 BNG report 36 Hampton Park  (PDF, 87.9 KB, 1 page)  251121 PS PR002887 FINAL  (PDF, 1.28 MB, 23 pages)  1645 L 02c Existing site plan  (PDF, 163 KB, 1 page)  1645 L  04a Existing South Elevation  (PDF, 117 KB, 1 page)  1645 L 05b Existing West Elevation  (PDF, 392 KB, 1 page)  1645 L 06a Existing North Elevation  (PDF, 431 KB, 1 page)  1645 L 07a Existing East Elevation  (PDF, 209 KB, 1 page)  1645 L 30e Proposed site plan  (PDF, 167 KB, 1 page)  1645 L 50 Proposed Lower Ground Floor  (PDF, 158 KB, 1 page)  1645 L 51 Proposed Ground Floor  (PDF, 162 KB, 1...
